headline: M&T Bank Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE:MTB) will announce its first quarter 2026 earnings results in a press release that will be issued before the market opens on Wednesday, April 15, 2026.
